LAW AND MOTION 302, MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT AND SET ASIDE AWARD IS CONTINUED FROM MAR-25-2015 TO MAY-26-2015, AT 9:30 AM, IN DEPT. 302, IN ORDER TO GIVE DEFENDANT TIME TO APPLY TO THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FOR RELIEF UNDER SECTION 98(F). IF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER HAS NOT HANDED DOWN HIS DECISION BY MAY 26, 2015, DEFENDANT SHALL NOTIFY THE COURT, IN ADVANCE OF THE MAY 26, 2015 HEARING DATE, TO CONTINUE THE HEARING AGAIN. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302. (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Vacate Judgment And Set Aside Award
Off Calendar Apr-17-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Vacate Judgment And Set Aside Award
Off Calendar Mar-25-2015 Continued To May-26-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DEBBIE YOU'S Motion To Vacate Judgment And Set Aside Award is continued to May 26, 2015 in order to give Defendant time to apply to the Labor Commissioner for relief under section 98(f). If the Labor Commissioner has not handed down his decision by May 26, 2015, Defendant shall notify the Court, in advance of the May 26, 2015 hearing date, to continue the hearing again. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)
